nasb.text: So now swear to me by the Lord that you will not cut off my descendants after me and that you will not destroy my name from my father’s household.”

esv.text: Swear to me therefore by the Lord that you will not cut off my offspring after me, and that you will not destroy my name out of my father’s house.”

cnv.text: 現在你要指著耶和華向我起誓，不剪除我的後裔，也不從我父家消滅我的名。”

ccb.text: 现在请你凭耶和华向我起誓，你不会杀害我的子孙，灭绝我的后代。”
